title: ---
content:
---

### I. | PURPOSE

To define how your system can function as an **educational ecosystem**, capable of generating syllabi, courses, and cross-disciplinary pedagogy grounded in your modular mythos and recursive logic. This supports academic CV building, community teaching, and open-source learning environments.

---

### II. | EDUCATIONAL TIERS

| TIER | NAME | OUTPUT TYPES | DESCRIPTION |
|--------------|---------------|--------------------------------------------------|-------------|
| Foundation | Core Logic | Manifestos, Orientation Modules | Intro to recursion, modular myth, remix culture, symbolic thought |
| Method | Applied Systems| Syllabi, Toolkits, Protocol Templates | Teaches specific systems (e.g., sonic layering, narrative recursion, archive theory) |
| Application | Case Practice | Workshops, Capstone Projects, Collaborative Labs | Experimental fieldwork, real-world prototyping, iterative creation |
